name: Squash Fritters
snippet: I love Squash and Zucchini.  Usually I sautee the vegetables with onions in a little olive oil. However, today I felt like trying something a little different.  I thought it would be fun to use the flavors I enjoy but to mix it up a bit.  I picked up some Mexican squash from the grocery store and figured there was no time like the present to experiment.  I used a recipe similar to my corn fritters, but tweaked it just a little.  These were so good, nice and crispy on the outside and very soft, almost creamy in the middle.  The thyme made the fritters very fragrant and added another layer of flavor that I really enjoyed.  I definitely plan on making these again, I may even add them to my Thanksgiving menu this year.  If you are tired of the same ol’ sides, try these and let me know what you think!
